title: Documentation and key-gated provider smoke scripts
description: Document the provider capability matrix, costs, ToS, prerequisites, and the no-key-persistence rule in README.md and a new docs/providers.md with copy-paste config examples, and ensure the deepseek and claude-code smoke scripts run only when the relevant key/binary is present, skip otherwise, and are excluded from npm test.

successCriteria.description: README.md Supported Providers section contains a capability matrix with rows for planner, researcher, curator, generator, evaluator, code-reviewer and columns for anthropic, deepseek, claude-code, marking claude-code unsupported for the four tool roles.

docs/providers.md exists and contains copy-paste bober.config.json snippets for anthropic (default), deepseek (noting npm install openai and DEEPSEEK_API_KEY), and claude-code (subscription, planner/researcher only), plus an explicit statement that agent-bober never persists API keys and that .env is gitignored.
docs/providers.md and the changed README section pass markdownlint with exit 0.
Running scripts/spike-deepseek.mjs (or scripts/provider-smoke.mjs) with no DEEPSEEK_API_KEY set prints a skip message and exits 0 without making any network call.
Running the claude-code smoke with no claude binary on PATH prints a skip message and exits 0; the smoke script(s) are not referenced by the npm test script in package.json.
npm test exits 0 and does not execute any smoke script (vitest config does not include scripts/*.mjs as test files).

nonGoals: Do not commit any API key, .env file, or secret into the repo.
Do not add the smoke scripts to the npm test command or vitest include globs.
Do not document or test OpenAI-compatible vendors other than DeepSeek.
Do not change provider source code behavior in this sprint — docs and smoke scripts only.
stopConditions: README and docs/providers.md carry the capability matrix, costs, ToS, prerequisites and no-key-persistence note and pass markdownlint; the key/binary-gated smoke scripts skip-and-exit-0 when secrets are absent and are excluded from npm test; npm test exits 0.
definitionOfDone: A new user reading README plus docs/providers.md can pick anthropic, deepseek, or claude-code and copy a working config snippet, understanding deepseek needs npm install openai and DEEPSEEK_API_KEY, that claude-code is subscription-billed and limited to planner/researcher per the 2026-06-15 ToS, and that agent-bober never persists keys. A maintainer can run the smoke scripts locally to verify deepseek completion plus tool_use and claude-code completion plus the tools-guard throw, and those scripts skip cleanly without secrets and never run in CI.
assumptions: The capability matrix mirrors the PRD Provider Capability Matrix exactly — evidence: PRD section 'Provider Capability Matrix'.

Smoke gating is by presence of DEEPSEEK_API_KEY (deepseek) and the claude binary on PATH (claude-code), skipping with exit 0 otherwise — evidence: PRD US-008 AC 'runs only when the relevant key/binary is present; skips otherwise'.
.env is already gitignored — evidence: .gitignore lines 10-12 list .env, .env.local, .env.*.local.
outOfScope: Any further provider code changes (covered by Sprints 2-5).
Cost dashboards or usage metering UI (PRD Non-Goals).
generatorNotes: Update README.md around the existing 'Supported Providers' section (line ~181) to add the capability matrix and a claude-code/deepseek row; note costs/ToS link (2026-06-15 metered, ~40k-token system-prompt overhead per claude -p call). Create docs/providers.md (docs/ dir exists) with three config snippets and the no-key-persistence statement. scripts/spike-deepseek.mjs already exists; ensure it guards on process.env.DEEPSEEK_API_KEY (skip+exit 0 if absent). Add a claude-code smoke (either a new scripts/provider-smoke.mjs covering both, or extend the existing spike-claude-code-provider.mjs) that probes the claude binary on PATH and skips if absent; cover deepseek completion+tool_use and claude-code completion+tools-guard throw. Confirm package.json test script (vitest) and vitest config do not include scripts/*.mjs. Run markdownlint on README.md and docs/providers.md.
evaluatorNotes: Read README.md and docs/providers.md to confirm the matrix rows/columns and the no-key-persistence statement are present and that deepseek prerequisites (npm install openai, DEEPSEEK_API_KEY) and claude-code limits (planner/researcher only, metered ToS) are documented. Run markdownlint and assert exit 0. Run the smoke script(s) with DEEPSEEK_API_KEY unset and no claude on PATH and assert each prints a skip and exits 0 with no network call. Inspect package.json and vitest config to confirm no smoke script is in the test globs. Run npm test and assert exit 0.
